philosophy.subtitle: The Fifth Element
philosophy.desc1: In ancient philosophy, Aether was considered the fifth element—the absolute medium that fills the universe and transmits light. Just as modern science posits invisible energy to explain the order and gravity of the cosmos, Aether is the essential medium that connects all things and transmits energy.
philosophy.desc2: Aethemar originates from this grand concept. We are not just an agency; we aim to be the 'most powerful invisible medium' that helps your brand's unique light and potential reach everywhere. Through AI technology, the modern Aether, we create limitless connections and growth.
philosophy.desc3: A name born by adding the strategic edge of Marketing to the infinite expandability of Aether: Aethemar. Just as light traverses the universe, we design an unparalleled path for your brand to shine brilliantly at the center of the world using the most innovative technologies and sharp insights.

ceo.desc: Bridging the analytical rigor of artificial intelligence with the creative intuition of high-end marketing. With a distinguished career as an in-house marketing director for leading hospitals and premier law firms, Lee Heekyung brings unparalleled expertise in navigating complex, trust-based industries.
ceo.mastery_desc: Strategic growth for medical and legal sectors.

intro_stories.title: Flexible Thinking, Mapsi Maker
intro_stories.desc: As a global marketer for LG Household & Health Care, I proposed an innovative 2-in-1 beauty item by mixing eyeshadow with nail polish, earning recognition for limitless creative fusion.
intro_stories.full_desc: As a global marketer for LG Household & Health Care, I planned and produced online marketing content to promote new products for the cosmetics division. I primarily created content aimed at global consumers, which was translated into Chinese and posted on the official website. However, as time went on, the manager mentioned that the plans from the 'Mapsi Makers' were often similar and overlapping, so I strived to come up with unique ideas. As a result, I submitted a proposal to mix skincare products with nail polish and lip tint, and the manager praised me for my creativity. I also marketed a 2-in-1 item by emphasizing a 1+1 function, such as mixing eyeshadow with nail polish or lipstick. This led to a diverse range of promotional proposals, and the manager was delighted, calling it an innovative approach they hadn't even considered. Given the honor of joining your company, I will faithfully fulfill my duties at every moment through a flexible mindset.

intro_stories.title: Elevating Brand Value
intro_stories.desc: During my time at 'Bella Citta', I pioneered house wedding services and drove multilingual SNS marketing that eventually secured a location sponsorship from KBS broadcasting.
intro_stories.full_desc: While working as a marketer for Bella Citta, a landmark in Busan, I worked hard to promote the brand by reflecting customer feedback. Bella Citta is a complex cultural space consisting of a restaurant on the 1st floor, a gallery on the 2nd floor, and a banquet hall on the 3rd floor, so I believed it had a wide range of applications. Therefore, I actively sought to raise Bella Citta's profile by planning a house wedding service for customers wanting a special ceremony. I was also happy because the prospective couples felt as blissful as movie protagonists in the romantic space. Furthermore, I planned and produced online marketing content promoting Bella Citta and posted it on my personal SNS in English, Japanese, and Korean. A KBS broadcasting PD saw the post and requested a location sponsorship. As a result, the owner awarded me a certificate and a bonus, saying it greatly helped promote Bella Citta thanks to the exposure in the final episode of the popular drama 'Lovers of Haeundae'. I also felt a sense of accomplishment by having my creative planning skills recognized. Based on my experience as a creator and marketer in various fields, I now want to unleash my capabilities at your company!

intro_stories.title: Cheerful, Bright, and Friendly
intro_stories.desc: Through 12 major extracurricular activities, including being a university ambassador and KBS youth panelist, I developed exceptional communication skills and approachability.
intro_stories.full_desc: Wanting to communicate with diverse people, I have proactively expanded my areas of activity. As a result, I developed the sociability to approach anyone first through 12 different extracurricular activities, including working as a corporate marketer in various fields. Additionally, as an ambassador for Pusan National University for two years, I improved my communication skills by planning official events and writing the campus newsletter. Furthermore, by participating in numerous TV recordings, such as being selected as a youth panelist for a KBS talk show and a demonstration model for domestic and international beauty broadcasts, I learned the art of conversation that opens others' ears and the power of listening. Living by my parents' teaching to 'go with all your heart wherever you go,' I always strive to greet everyone with a smile first and create a joyful atmosphere. Based on a bright, polite attitude and a sense of responsibility, I will be a cheerful worker who instills a favorable impression of your company.

intro_stories.title: The Value of Collaborative Challenge
intro_stories.desc: Leveraging my English and Japanese skills, I won first prize in an overseas challenge contest, leading to a fully-funded trip to Cornell University, learning to overcome crises with teamwork.
intro_stories.full_desc: To communicate with people around the world in line with the global era, I learned English, Japanese, and other cultures. Through this, I challenged the 'PNU Overseas Challenge and Experience' contest with my colleagues and won the grand prize. At the time, it overlapped with the exam period, so I couldn't sleep properly for two weeks while juggling research and studies, but the thought of taking on a meaningful challenge gave me strength. There were difficult moments when we studied individually during the day and gathered at dawn to divide the workload, but we persevered through teamwork and passion thanks to mutual encouragement and consideration. As a result, we were invited by Cornell University, toured the campus, and experienced another culture firsthand. I was grateful for the hospitality we received from the foreigners who welcomed us, so I will emulate that kindness and extend warm goodwill to everyone I meet in the future. Furthermore, I want to be a diligent talent who overcomes crises with teamwork and passion during the working process.

intro_stories.title: Driven by a Challenging Spirit
intro_stories.desc: When heavy rain threatened an outdoor busking event at Lotte Department Store, I pushed through by creating waterproof banners and actively promoting the event in the rain, demonstrating unyielding drive.
intro_stories.full_desc: I give my utmost passion with a challenging spirit as my weapon in any unexpected situation. This happened when I planned and hosted a festival called 'Busking Day' as the team leader of the Lotte Department Store PR team. Since it was held outdoors in midsummer, we prepared fans as promotional items to cool off the customers, but it unexpectedly rained on the day of the event. I was flustered, but to make up for it, I created new waterproof banners just hours before the event. Furthermore, I put in manifold effort, such as wearing raincoats and running around in the rain with my colleagues as a team to promote the event. As a result, the outdoor event, which was almost canceled, could be held thanks to the many customers who visited, and I felt rewarded when customers were satisfied with the warm drinks provided instead of fans. Since it was an event held in the rain, there were moments of concern, but I was able to conclude the event successfully by striving to fulfill my responsibilities as a team leader. In addition, I felt grateful to my colleagues who didn't surrender to the environment and ran together until the end. Through this, I learned firsthand that there is nothing in the world that cannot be accomplished with a 'can-do' challenging spirit and the strongest teamwork.

services.title: Our Capabilities
services.subtitle: Precision engineering meets limitless creativity. We architect digital dominance.
services.card1_desc: Data-driven marketing architectures designed for elite conversion. We don't just run campaigns; we build self-sustaining ecosystems of brand authority.
services.card2_desc: Bespoke application and web development tailored for scale. We engineer digital products that serve as the technological backbone of your enterprise.
services.card3_desc: We produce high-end brand commercial videos that transcend physical limits using cutting-edge generative AI models.
